commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Google API-key onboarding default Gemini model from `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview` to `google/gemini-3-flash-preview`.

PR surface: Source 0. Total 0 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows the PR changes the onboarding default while current Google provider docs still document the old value. No runtime bug reproduction applies because this is a default-choice PR, not a reported broken behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer default-policy judgment, so an automated repair is not the right next step.

target.title: feat(commands): switch gemini default model to gemini-3-flash-preview
target.body:
## Summary

Switches the default Gemini model used during Google provider onboarding from `google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview` to `google/gemini-3-flash-preview`.

- Single-line change in `extensions/google/onboard.ts` (`GOOGLE_GEMINI_DEFAULT_MODEL`).
- Picks the faster/cheaper Flash preview as the out-of-the-box default for new Google onboardings.

## Verification

- `gemini-3-flash-preview` is a real catalogued model ref — defined in `extensions/google/provider-catalog.ts:57` and exercised across the Google plugin tests (`transport-stream.test.ts`, `model-id.test.ts`, `thinking.test.ts`).
- New default is not in the `RETIRED_GOOGLE_GEMINI_MODEL_REFS` set in the same file, so it won't be normalized away.
- Compatibility note: this only changes the *default* selected during onboarding; existing configs that pin a model are unaffected.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: woyzeck1978
